title: No Hurt Cam
description: More options for damage tilt effects.
body:
# No Hurt Cam
-Provides a slider from 0-120% for both screen shake and hand shake when damaged.  
-Alternative GUI for damage tilt options in the Options menu.  
-Toggle directional tilt when damaged.  
-Improved view bobbing options which replace vanilla settings.  
-Change world or hand bobbing separately.  

Make sure to enable view bobbing for changes to apply.

## Showcase:
https://youtu.be/pYLI1rB_t38

Contact me for issues/suggestions on Discord.
